description.en:
Whenever you loot an item from a Chest, it will have:
  • A Visceral or lower rarity add-on.
  • {Tunable.S07P03.ModifyChestItemSecondAddonChance%}% chance for an Uncommon or lower rarity add-on.


When you escape, you keep your add-ons.
description.ru: При обыске сундуков вы получаете аддоны, а при побеге сохраняете их.

description.en:
When all Generators are completed, if you are downed or injured, heal instantly. Then, ignoring {Keyword.Exhausted}:
  • You gain {Tunable.S02P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S02P03.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S02P03.ExhaustionDuration}s.
description.ru: Мгновенно лечит на одно состояние здоровья в финальной фазе и даёт ускорение.

description.en:
You and up to {Tunable.S15P02.MaxSurvivors} Survivors see each other's Auras whenever:
  • You unhook them, or they unhook you.
  • You finish healing them, or they finish healing you.


This effect lasts until you are hooked.
description.ru: Вы и другие выжившие видите ауры друг друга после спасения или лечения.

description.en:
While carrying a Survivor:
  • You gain {Tunable.K01P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.
  • Your Terror Radius is {Tunable.K01P03.TerrorRadiusIncreaseSize}m larger.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость передвижения и радиус ужаса при переноске выжившего.

description.en:
Whenever the Killer breaks a Pallet or Breakable Wall, or damages a Generator:
  • You hear a sound cue.
  • You see their Aura for {Tunable.S09P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Вы видите ауру убийцы, когда он ломает объекты или повреждает генератор.

description.en:
While next to a Dropped Pallet, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} for {Tunable.S20P02.ActionTimeRequired}s to reset it.

You see the Auras of Dropped Pallets.
description.ru: Позволяет сброшенную палку вернуть в вертикальное положение.

description.en:
You start the trial with {Tunable.S14P03.StartingTokens} Tokens, up to {Tunable.S14P03.MaxToken}, and your good basic healing Skill Checks give {Tunable.S14P03.InitialProgressionPenalty%}% less progress.

While healing without a Med-Kit:
  • Whenever you hit a basic Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S14P03.TokensPerSkillCheck} token.
  • Whenever you hit a basic Skill Check, for each Token, you gain {Tunable.S14P03.ProgressionBonusPerToken%}% more progress.
  • You cannot get great basic Skill Checks.
description.ru: Даёт токены за успешные проверки навыка при лечении, ускоряя прогресс.

description.en:
Whenever you unhook a Survivor:
  • They gain {Tunable.S18P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S18P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • They leave no Pools of Blood for {Tunable.S18P01.StealthDuration}s.
  • They leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S18P01.StealthDuration}s.
  • You see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S18P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: После спасения выживший получает ускорение и скрытность, а вы видите ауру убийцы.

description.en:
Whenener you fall from at least {Tunable.S05P01.RequiredFallHeight}m:
  • You gain {Tunable.S05P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S05P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S05P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.
  • Your stagger is {Tunable.S05P01.FallStaggerReduction%}% shorter.
  • Your Grunts from falling are {Tunable.S05P01.FallGruntReduction%}% quieter.
description.ru: После падения с высоты вы получаете ускорение, но становитесь измотанным.

description.en:
Whenever you vault a Window, it is blocked for Survivors for {Tunable.K12P01.WindowBlockDurations}s.

You basic-vault Windows {Tunable.K12P01.WindowVaultSpeed%}% faster.

Only 1 Window can be blocked at a time.
description.ru: Блокирует прыжки через препятствия после их использования.

description.en: Whenever you hook a Survivor, for {Tunable.K09P02.AuraRevealDuration}s, you see the Auras of all Survivors who are at least {Tunable.K09P02.MinDistanceFromHook}m away from the hooked Survivor.
description.ru: После подвешивания выжившего вы видите ауры остальных выживших на расстоянии.

description.en: Whenever you gain Bloodlust, gain {Keyword.Undetectable} for {Tunable.K08P01.UndetectableDuration}s.
description.ru: При получении кровожадности вы становитесь необнаружимым.

description.en:
While you are repairing a Generator:
  • Other Survivors see that Generator's Aura.
  • Whenever the Killer downs a Survivor, you see the Auras of all Survivors for {Tunable.S19P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру генератора другим выжившим и раскрывает ауры при падении.

description.en:
Whenever a Generator is completed, you see the Auras of Survivors within {Tunable.KG_Bitter_Murmur.AuraRevealRange}m of it for {Tunable.KG_Bitter_Murmur.AuraRevealDuration}s.

When all Generators are completed, you see the Auras of all Survivors for {Tunable.KG_Bitter_Murmur.AuraRevealEndgameDuration}s.
description.ru: После завершения генератора вы видите ауры выживших рядом с ним.

description.en:
Whenever you hook a Survivor, for {Tunable.K18P02.HemorrhageExhaustionDuration}s, all injured Survivors:
  • Gain {Keyword.Exhausted}.
  • Gain {Keyword.Hemorrhage}.
description.ru: После подвешивания все раненые выжившие становятся измотанными и истекают кровью.

description.en: Pools of Blood are brighter and last {Tunable.K02P02.ExtraTrackDuration}s longer.
description.ru: Следы крови ярче и сохраняются дольше.

description.en:
While you are not the Obsession:
  • While you or the Obsession are injured, you see each other's Auras.
  • Whenever you finish healing the Obsession, or they finish healing you, while within {Tunable.S22P02.RequiredDistance}m of each other, you both gain {Tunable.S22P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.


When the trial starts, you are less likely to be the Obsession.
description.ru: Вы и одержимый видите ауры друг друга и получаете ускорение при лечении.

description.en:
When an Exit Gate is opened, once per trial, when you hook a Survivor, both Exits are blocked for {Tunable.K10P03.GateBlockDuration}s.

You see the Auras of Survivors within Exit Thresholds.
description.ru: Блокирует выходы после подвешивания у выхода и показывает ауры выживших у врат.

description.en:
While carried by the Killer:
  • Whenever the Killer falls from at least {Tunable.S13P03.RequiredFallHeight}m, you gain {Tunable.S13P03.FallExtraWiggle%}% of your current wiggle progress.
  • Your wiggle is {Tunable.S13P03.WiggleIntensity%}% stronger.
  • Within {Tunable.S13P03.HookAuraBlockRange}m, the Killer cannot see Hook Auras.
description.ru: Усиливает эффект борьбы и скрывает ауру крюка.

description.en: Within {Tunable.S01P01.AuraRevealDistance}m, you see other Survivors' Auras.
description.ru: Показывает ауры ближайших выживших.

description.en:
Whenever you snuff a Boon Totem:
  • You see the Auras of all Survivors within its range for {Tunable.SG_Shattered_Hope.AuraRevealDuration}s.
  • It is destroyed.
description.ru: При уничтожении тотема вы видите ауры выживших в его радиусе.

description.en:
Whenever you unhook a Survivor:
  • They retain their unhook {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S08P02.EnduranceExtraDuration}s longer.
  • They retain their unhook {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S08P02.HasteExtraDuration}s longer.
description.ru: Даёт неуязвимость при снятии с крюка рядом с убийцей.

description.en: You heal {Tunable.S03P02.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость лечения.

description.en:
Whenever you are unhooked:
  • The Hook breaks, then is repaired after {Tunable.S15P01.HookRespawnTime}s.
  • You see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S15P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: После спасения крюк ломается, а вы видите ауру убийцы.

description.en:
Within {Tunable.S20P03.RequiredDistance}m of a carried Survivor:
  • You gain {Tunable.S20P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.
  • The carried Survivor wiggles {Tunable.S20P03.ExtraWiggle%}% faster.
description.ru: Ускоряет вас и освобождение выжившего при переноске.

description.en: You basic-break Pallets and Breakable Walls, and damage Generators {Tunable.K01P02.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость разрушения объектов и повреждения генераторов.

description.en:
While healing a downed Survivor, you both see the Killer's Aura.

Whenever you finish healing a downed Survivor or fully recover:
  • The Survivor gains {Tunable.S17P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S17P02.HasteDuration}s.
  • The Survivor leaves no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S17P02.HasteDuration}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру убийцы при лечении упавшего и даёт ускорение после.

description.en:
While holding a depleted item, after hiding in a Locker for {Tunable.S23P03.RequiredDuration}s, it is recharged to {Tunable.S23P03.InitialRefill%}%.

Each time you recharge an item this way, it recharges {Tunable.S23P03.RefillDiminishing%}% fewer Charges.
description.ru: Перезаряжает истощённый предмет в шкафчике.

description.en:
You do not scare Crows or scream.

You bless and cleanse Totems, and unlock Chests silently, but {Tunable.S04P02.ActionSpeedReduction%}% slower.
description.ru: Вы не пугаете ворон и не кричите, но медленнее взаимодействуете с объектами.

description.en: While you are struggling on Hook, when another Survivor gets within {Tunable.S18P02.PauseDistance}m, the timer is paused for {Tunable.S18P02.PauseTimer}s.
description.ru: Останавливает таймер жертвы, когда другой выживший рядом.

description.en: When the trial starts, the {Tunable.K15P01.GeneratorsBlocked} farthest Generators from you are blocked for {Tunable.K15P01.GeneratorBlockDuration}s, or until you down a Survivor.
description.ru: Блокирует 3 дальних генератора на 120 секунд в начале матча.

description.en:
Survivors within your Terror Radius:
  • Heal {Tunable.K12P02.HealPenalty%}% slower.
  • While healing, basic Skill Checks spin {Tunable.K12P02.SkillCheckSpeedIncrease%}% faster.
description.ru: Замедляет лечение выживших в радиусе ужаса.

description.en:
Whenever a Generator is completed:
  • You see the Auras of all Windows for {Tunable.K17P02.BlockDuration}s.
  • All Windows are blocked for Survivors for {Tunable.K17P02.BlockDuration}s.
description.ru: Блокирует окна после завершения генератора.

description.en: Whenever you fast-exit a Locker, medium-vault, or fast-vault, you leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S13P01.Duration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S13P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: После быстрого выхода из шкафчика или прыжка вы не оставляете следов.

description.en: Whenever a Generator is completed, when the Killer gets within {Tunable.SG_Dark_Sense.AuraRevealDistance}m of you, you see their Aura for {Tunable.SG_Dark_Sense.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: После завершения генератора вы видите ауру убийцы, когда он рядом.

description.en:
Whenever the Obsession takes damage, for {Tunable.K15P03.TerrorRadiusTransferDuration}s:
  • Your Terror Radius is set to {Tunable.K15P03.TerrorRadiusSize}m.
  • The Obsession has your Terror Radius.
  • You gain {Keyword.Undetectable}.
description.ru: При атаке одержимого вы получаете его радиус ужаса и становитесь необнаружимым.

description.en:
Whenever you are unhooked, while injured and running, use {Input.ActivatableButton1}:
  • You gain {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S10P02.EnduranceDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S10P02.ExhaustedDuration}s.
description.ru: Даёт неуязвимость по требованию во время погони.

description.en: When you hook a Survivor, the first time a Survivor stops repairing a Generator, it is blocked for {Tunable.K19P02.GeneratorBlockDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K19P02.GeneratorBlockDuration}s.
description.ru: Блокирует генератор, когда выживший прекращает его чинить после подвешивания.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor finishes healing another, they scream. Then, until they take damage, while they are at least {Tunable.K20P03.MaximumDistance}m away from that Survivor:
  • They gain {Keyword.Oblivious}.
  • They see that Survivor's Aura.
description.ru: После лечения выживший кричит и становится забывчивым на расстоянии.

description.en:
Until all Generators are completed, whenever you are unhooked, for the next {Tunable.S06P02.EffectDuration}s: when the Killer picks you up, once per trial, hit a Special Skill check:
  • Stun the Killer for {Tunable.S06P02.StunDuration}s.
  • Become the Obsession.


This is disabled by conspicuous actions. At the start of the trial, you are more likely to be the Obsession.
description.ru: Оглушает убийцу после подъёма.

description.en:
Every {Tunable.KG_Deerstalker.RevealTimeIntervals}s, the Survivor with the least time in chase sees your Aura for {Tunable.KG_Deerstalker.RevealDuration}s.

While a Survivor sees your Aura, you see their Aura.
description.ru: Показывает ауру выжившего с наименьшим временем в погоне.

description.en: You see the Auras of the {Tunable.SG_Deja_Vu.GeneratorsShown} Generators closest to each other and repair them {Tunable.SG_Deja_Vu.RepairSpeed%}% faster.
description.ru: Показывает ауры 3 генераторов и увеличивает скорость их ремонта.

description.en: Once per trial, when you safely unhook another Survivor, you can unhook yourself. When you unhook yourself this way, you gain {Keyword.Broken} for {Tunable.S14P02.BrokenDuration}s.
description.ru: Позволяет спасти себя один раз, но вы становитесь сломленным.

description.en:
For each injured, downed, or hooked Survivor:
  • You heal {Tunable.S23P02.ExtraActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unhook {Tunable.S23P02.ExtraActionSpeed%}% faster.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость лечения и спасения при раненых выживших.

description.en:
Whenever a Generator is completed, for {Tunable.S12P02.RevealDuration}s, within {Tunable.S12P02.RevealDistance}m of you:
  • You see the Auras of Chests.
  • You see the Auras of Generators.
  • You see the Auras of Totems.
description.ru: После завершения генератора вы видите ауры объектов рядом.

description.en:
Within {Tunable.K14P01.EffectRange}m of you, whenever a Generator is being repaired by at least 2 Survivors, you are alerted.

While that Generator is being repaired by at least 2 Survivors, you see its Aura. When it is no longer being repaired by at least 2 Survivors, this ends after {Tunable.K14P01.AuraLingerDuration}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру генератора, когда несколько выживших его чинят.

description.en:
When the trial starts, and after being chased for {Tunable.S15P03.RegainTokenDuration}s, you earn {Tunable.S15P03.TokensRegained} Token, up to {Tunable.S15P03.MaxTokens}.

While not downed, whenever the Killer attempts to see your Aura, spend {Tunable.S15P03.StartingTokenAmount} Token. Then, for the next {Tunable.S15P03.HiddenDuration}s:
  • The Killer cannot see your Aura.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.
description.ru: Скрывает вашу ауру от убийцы за токены.

description.en: Your Terror Radius is {Tunable.KG_Distressing.TerrorRadiusIncreaseSize%}% larger.
description.ru: Увеличивает радиус ужаса.

description.en:
After hiding for {Tunable.S14P01.RequiredChargeTime}s within the Killer's Terror Radius, while crouched and idle, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to throw a pebble {Tunable.S14P01.ThrowDistance}m away:
  • The Killer is alerted.
  • The pebble leaves Scratch Marks.
description.ru: Позволяет бросить камень, чтобы отвлечь убийцу.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Generator, for the next {Tunable.K21P01.ActiveDuration}s, the first Survivor that repairs that Generator:
  • They scream, then you are alerted to their position for {Tunable.K21P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
  • They gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K21P01.ExposedDuration}s.


Cooldown: {Tunable.K21P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: После повреждения генератора первый выживший, начавший его чинить, кричит и становится уязвимым.

description.en:
Whenever you hook a Survivor that is not the Obsession, earn {Tunable.K06P02.TokensPerHook} token.

While the Obsession is alive, for each Token:
  • Other Survivors heal {Tunable.K06P02.ActionSpeedPenaltyPerToken%}% slower.
  • Other Survivors repair {Tunable.K06P02.ActionSpeedPenaltyPerToken%}% slower.
  • Other Survivors sabotage Hooks {Tunable.K06P02.ActionSpeedPenaltyPerToken%}% slower.


The Obsession:
  • Heals other Survivors {Tunable.K06P02.ObsessionActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • Unhooks other Survivors {Tunable.K06P02.ObsessionActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
description.ru: Замедляет действия выживших, кроме одержимого, за каждый токен.

description.en: Within {Tunable.S03P01.AuraRevealDistance}m, you see the Auras of injured Survivors.
description.ru: Показывает ауры раненых выживших рядом.

description.en: While not carrying a Survivor, Pallet-stuns are {Tunable.K03P01.StunDurationReduction%}% shorter.
description.ru: Уменьшает длительность оглушения поддоном.

description.en:
Whenever a Generator is completed, earn {Tunable.K10P01.TokensPerGenerator} Token, up to {Tunable.K10P01.MaxTokens}.

For each Token:
  • You basic-break Pallets and Breakable Walls {Tunable.K10P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • You damage Generators {Tunable.K10P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • You pick-up and drop Survivors {Tunable.K10P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • You basic-vault Windows {Tunable.K10P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость разрушения и взаимодействия за каждый завершённый генератор.

description.en:
While walking, you gain {Tunable.S19P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.

You see your own Scratch Marks.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость ходьбы и показывает ваши следы.

description.en: While downed, whenever the Killer picks you up, {Tunable.S17P01.RecoveryRatio%}% of your recovery progress is added to your wiggle progress, up to {Tunable.S17P01.MaxWiggle%}%.
description.ru: Конвертирует прогресс барахтания в восстановление.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor takes a protection hit, they gain {Keyword.Broken} for {Tunable.K20P01.BrokenDuration}s.
description.ru: Выживший, принявший защитный удар, становится сломленным.

description.en:
While healthy and healing another Survivor without a Med-Kit, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to heal them instantly:
  • You take damage.
  • You gain {Keyword.Broken} for {Tunable.S21P03.BrokenDuration}s.
  • You become the Obsession.


When the trial starts, you are less likely to be the Obsession.
description.ru: Позволяет мгновенно вылечить выжившего, но вы получаете урон и становитесь сломленным.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Survivor with a basic attack, they drop their item.

Within {Tunable.K09P03.ItemsRevealDistance}m, you see the Auras of dropped items.
description.ru: При атаке выживший теряет предмет, а вы видите ауры брошенных предметов.

description.en:
Whenever you hook the Obsession:
  • You gain {Tunable.K16P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.K16P03.UndetectableHasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Undetectable} for {Tunable.K16P03.UndetectableHasteDuration}s.


Whenever the Obsession is unhooked, the Survivor who unhooked them becomes the Obsession.
description.ru: После подвешивания одержимого вы получаете ускорение и необнаружимость.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor takes damage, for the next {Tunable.K19P01.EffectDuration}s, whenever a Survivor repairing a Generator hits a good basic Skill Check, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K19P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру выжившего при успешной проверке навыка после получения урона.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Generator:
  • Its regression speed will go from {Tunable.K07P03.StartingRegressionSpeed%}% to {Tunable.K07P03.MaxRegressionSpeed%}% over the next {Tunable.K07P03.RegressionRampDuration}s.
  • The next Survivor who starts repairing it gets a special Skill Check. If they miss it, they lose {Tunable.K07P03.GenRegressionOnFail%}% more progress.
description.ru: Увеличивает регрессию генератора и добавляет сложную проверку навыка.

description.en:
When the trial starts, 4 random Hooks become Scourge Hooks.

While carrying a Survivor, you see the Auras of Survivors within {Tunable.K11P01.AuraRevealDistance}m of Scourge Hooks.

Whenever a Survivor starts sabotaging a Hook, you are alerted.
description.ru: Показывает ауры выживших рядом с проклятыми крюками и предупреждает о саботаже.

description.en: After hiding in a Locker for {Tunable.S16P03.HideRequiredDuration}s, fast-exit to stun the Killer for {Tunable.S16P03.LockerStunDuration}s if they are within {Tunable.S16P03.LockerStunRange}m, then gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S16P03.ExhaustedDuration}s.
description.ru: Оглушить убийцу при выходе из шкафчика.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

Whenever a Survivor is unhooked while you are at least {Tunable.K05P03.DistanceFromHook}m away, earn {Tunable.K05P03.TokensPerUnhook} Token, up to {Tunable.K05P03.MaxTokens}:
  • 2 Tokens | {Tunable.K05P03.HasteDelayDuration}s after hooking a Survivor, gain {Tunable.K05P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.K05P03.HasteDuration}s.
  • 3 Tokens | Survivors gain {Keyword.Exposed}.
  • 5 Tokens | You can Kill downed Survivors.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение, уязвимость и возможность убивать за токены.

description.en:
When the trial starts, 2 Dull Totems ignite.

When either of those Hex Totems is blessed or cleansed:
  • All Survivors gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K13P02.ExposedDuration}s.
  • The other Totem is extinguished.
description.ru: При очищении тотема все выжившие становятся уязвимыми.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

Whenever you hook a Survivor, earn {Tunable.K08P03.TokensPerHook} Token. For each Token, Basic Skill Check warnings appear later and good success zones are smaller.

While you have 5 Tokens, Basic Skill Check warnings don't appear.

Whenever a Survivor misses a basic Skill Check, they lose {Tunable.K08P03.RegressionBonus%}% more progress.
description.ru: Усложняет проверки навыка и увеличивает регрессию при промахе.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

While a Generator is not being repaired, it regresses at {Tunable.K05P02.RegressionSpeed%}% speed.
description.ru: Регрессирует генераторы, когда выжившие прекращают ремонт.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

Whenever you damage a Survivor with a basic or special-attack, they gain {Keyword.Blindness}.

This applies for up to {Tunable.K05P01.MaxAffectedSurvivors} Survivors.
description.ru: При атаке выжившие получают слепоту.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

For each Dull and Hex Totem remaining, you have {Tunable.KG_Hex_Thrill_Of_The_Hunt.TokensPerTotem} Token.

For each Token, Survivors bless and cleanse totems {Tunable.KG_Hex_Thrill_Of_The_Hunt.ActionSpeedReductionPerToken%}% slower.
description.ru: Замедляет очищение тотемов за каждый оставшийся тотем.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

Whenever you damage a Survivor, Upright Pallets within {Tunable.K21P03.EffectRadius}m of them are blocked for {Tunable.K21P03.BlockDuration}s.
description.ru: При атаке блокирует палки рядом с выжившим.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

Whenever a Survivor starts blessing or cleansing a Totem, they gain {Keyword.Oblivious} for {Tunable.K19P03.ObliviousDuration}s.

Whenever a Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, you see the Auras of all Survivors for {Tunable.K19P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: При очищении тотема выжившие становятся забывчивыми, а вы видите их ауры.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

When another Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, it replaces this one and keeps any Tokens it had.

You see the Auras of Survivors within {Tunable.K21P02.AuraRevealDistance}m of Dull Totems.
description.ru: Переносит другие проклятия при очищении; показывает ауры выживших рядом с тотемами.

description.en: When all Generators are completed, you gain {Tunable.SG_Hope.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение после завершения всех генераторов.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor fast-enters or fast-exits a Locker, or medium or fast-vaults within {Tunable.K16P01.ActivationRange}m of you, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K16P01.AuraRevealDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K16P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру выжившего при быстром действии рядом с вами.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor is downed, Survivors within your Terror Radius scream and you are alerted for {Tunable.K15P02.RevealDuration}s.
description.ru: При нокдауне показывает ауры ближайших выживших.

description.en: Whenever you cleanse a Totem, while injured and not {Keyword.Broken}, after hiding in a Locker for {Tunable.S19P03.HideDuration}s, you become healthy instantly.
description.ru: Лечит одно состояние в шкафчике после очищения тотема.

description.en: After being idle for {Tunable.KG_Insidious.TimeToActivate}s, you gain {Keyword.Undetectable} until you act.
description.ru: Даёт необнаружимость после бездействия.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor drops a Pallet, for the next {Tunable.K09P01.TriggerTime}s, if they move {Tunable.K09P01.DistanceThreshold}m away from it, they gain {Tunable.K09P01.Hindered%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.K09P01.HinderedDuration}s.
description.ru: Замедляет выжившего, если он отходит от палки после её сброса.

description.en:
While carrying a Survivor:
  • They wiggle {Tunable.KG_Iron_Grasp.WiggleTimeIncrease%}% slower.
  • Their wiggle is {Tunable.KG_Iron_Grasp.WiggleStrengthReduction%}% weaker.
description.ru: Замедляет освобождение выжившего при переноске.

description.en: While injured and not {Keyword.Exhausted}, your Grunts of Pain are {Tunable.S04P01.InjuredNoiseReduction%}% quieter.
description.ru: Уменьшает стоны боли в состоянии ранения.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor exits a Locker:
  • They gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K14P03.ExposedDuration}s.
  • They scream, then you are alerted to their location for {Tunable.K14P03.RevealDuration}s.


You open Lockers {Tunable.K14P03.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
description.ru: Выжившие кричат и становятся уязвимыми при выходе из шкафчика.

description.en:
When the trial starts, {Tunable.K22P01.ExtraChestsSpawned} more Chests appear.

Whenever a Survivor picks-up an item or starts unlocking a Chest within {Tunable.K22P01.RevealDistance}m of you, you are alerted.
description.ru: Появляются дополнительные сундуки, и вы видите ауры выживших рядом с предметами.

description.en: Whenever you damage a Generator, up to {Tunable.K22P02.AffectedGenerators} other Generators start regressing. Survivors repairing them get a special Skill Check. Cooldown: {Tunable.K22P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: При повреждении генератора другие генераторы начинают регрессировать.

description.en:
Whenever a Generator is completed, you earn {Tunable.K22P03.TokensGainedPerGenerator} Tokens, up to {Tunable.K22P03.MaxTokens}.

Whenever you lunge-attack, spend {Tunable.K22P03.TokensSpentPerLunge} Token to make it {Tunable.K22P03.LungeExtraDuration%}% longer.
description.ru: Увеличивает дальность выпада за токены от завершённых генераторов.

description.en:
While carrying a Survivor, Survivors within your Terror Radius gain {Keyword.Exposed}. This ends {Tunable.K23P01.ExposedLingerDuration}s after:
  • They leave your Terror Radius.
  • You drop or hook the carried Survivor.


Cooldown: {Tunable.K23P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Раскрывает выживших рядом при переноске выжившего.

description.en:
The first time a Survivor medium or fast-vaults a Window, a Dull Totem ignites.

The last {Tunable.K23P02.MaximumVaultsBlocked} Windows Survivors medium or fast-vault are blocked.

You basic-vault blocked Windows {Tunable.K23P02.VaultSpeedIncrease%}% faster.

You see the Auras of blocked Windows within {Tunable.K23P02.AuraRevealDistance}m.
description.ru: Блокирует окна после прыжка и ускоряет ваши прыжки.

description.en:
The first time you hook each Survivor, you earn {Tunable.K23P03.TokensPerUniqueHook} Token.

When all Generators are completed, when a Survivor starts opening an Exit Gate:
  • It is blocked {Tunable.K23P03.GateBlockBaseDuration}s, plus {Tunable.K23P03.GateBlockDurationPerToken}s for each Token.
  • You are alerted.
description.ru: Блокирует выходы при их открытии после завершения генераторов.

description.en:
When the trial starts, you see the Auras of all Survivors for {Tunable.K24P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

Whenever you see a Survivor's Aura for a duration, it is {Tunable.K24P01.BonusAuraRevealDuration}s longer.
description.ru: Показывает ауры всех выживших в начале матча.

description.en: Whenever a healthy Survivor becomes injured, all injured Survivors gain {Keyword.Oblivious} for {Tunable.K24P02.ObliviousDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K24P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: При ранении здорового выжившего все раненые становятся забывчивыми.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Generator, when you down a Survivor, all Generators damaged this way:
  • Explode, lose {Tunable.K24P03.GeneratorRegress%}% progress and start regressing.
  • Survivors repairing them scream, then you see their Auras for {Tunable.K24P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.


Cooldown: {Tunable.K24P03.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: При падении выжившего повреждённые генераторы взрываются и регрессируют.

description.en: Whenever a Generator is completed, the Generator with the most progress is blocked for {Tunable.K25P01.GeneratorBlockDuration}s.
description.ru: Блокирует наиболее прокачанный генератор после завершения одного.

description.en:
The first time you hook each Survivor, they are hexed and a Dull Totem ignites.

For {Tunable.K25P02.TotemBlockDuration}s, the Hex Totem is blocked to other Survivors.

The hexed Survivors:

  • Gain {Keyword.Oblivious}.
  • Within {Tunable.K25P02.TotemAuraRevealDistance}m of the Hex totem, they see it's Aura.
description.ru: Одержимые выжившие становятся забывчивыми и видят тотем.

description.en:
When the trial starts, 4 random Hooks become Scourge Hooks.

Whenever a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook:
  • They gain {Keyword.Hemorrhage} for {Tunable.K25P03.MangledHemorrhageDuration}s.
  • They gain {Keyword.Mangled} for {Tunable.K25P03.MangledHemorrhageDuration}s.
  • When they are healed, until they take damage, they heal and repair {Tunable.K25P03.ActionSpeedDebuff%}% slower.
description.ru: После спасения с проклятого крюка выживший получает кровотечение и замедление.

description.en:
Whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, earn {Tunable.K26P01.TokensPerUniqueHook} Token.

When you move {Tunable.K26P01.HookedDistance}m away from the hooked Survivor, all Generators are blocked for {Tunable.K26P01.GeneratorBlockDuration}s.

When you have {Tunable.K26P01.SurvivorsToBeHooked} Tokens, when you move {Tunable.K26P01.HookedDistance}m away from the hooked Survivor:
  • All Generators are blocked for {Tunable.K26P01.FinalGeneratorBlockDuration}s.
  • You see the Obsession's Aura for {Tunable.K26P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Блокирует генераторы после подвешивания и показывает ауру одержимого.

description.en:
When the trial starts:
  • 4 random Hooks become Scourge Hooks.
  • You earn {Tunable.K26P02.StartingTokens} Tokens.


The first time each Survivor is hooked on a Scourge Hook, spend {Tunable.K26P02.TokensSpentOnUniqueHook} Token, then the Generator with the most progress:
  • Explodes, loses {Tunable.K26P02.GeneratorRegression%}% progress and starts regressing.
  • Survivors repairing it scream.
description.ru: При подвешивании на проклятый крюк самый продвинутый генератор взрывается.

description.en:
You see the Auras of cleansed Totems, and can rekindle each once.

Within {Tunable.K26P03.TotemAuraReveaDistance}m, Survivors see the Auras of Rekindled Totems.

While a totem is rekindled, Survivors heal and repair {Tunable.K26P03.BaseActionSpeedPenalty%}% slower, plus {Tunable.K26P03.ActionSpeedPenaltyPerTotem%}% for each additional Rekindled Totem.

When all {Tunable.K26P03.MaxTokens} Totems are rekindled at once, they are blocked.
description.ru: Замедляет действия выживших за каждую зажжённую тотем.

description.en:
When the trial starts, 4 random Hooks become Scourge Hooks.

Whenever a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, you see the Auras of other Survivors for {Tunable.K27P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: После спасения с проклятого крюка вы видите ауры выживших.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Generator, it regresses {Tunable.K27P02.RegressionModifier%}% faster for {Tunable.K27P02.Duration}s.

For that time, whenever a Survivor hits a good basic Skill Check while repairing that Generator, you are alerted.
description.ru: Увеличивает регрессию генератора и предупреждает о проверках навыка.

description.en: The first time each Generator has {Tunable.K27P03.GeneratorProgressionRequired%}% progress: Survivors repairing it get special Skill Checks. If they miss one of these or stop repairing, that Generator is blocked for {Tunable.K27P03.GeneratorBlockedDuration}s.
description.ru: Блокирует генератор при промахе проверки навыка на определённом прогрессе.

description.en: {Tunable.K28P01.TimeBeforeTrigger}s after a Survivor takes damage, for {Tunable.K28P01.EffectDuration}s, the next time a Survivor fast-vaults a Pallet while within your Terror Radius, it is destroyed.
description.ru: Уничтожает палку при быстром прыжке после получения урона.

description.en: Whenever you search a Locker, you see the Auras of Survivors within {Tunable.K28P02.DetectionDistance}m of Lockers for {Tunable.K28P02.AuraRevealDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K28P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: При обыске шкафчика вы видите ауры выживших рядом.

description.en:
While a Survivor within your Terror Radius is healing:
  • They gain {Keyword.Blindness}.
  • They gain {Keyword.Exhausted}.


When they stop healing, this ends after {Tunable.K28P03.BlindnessExhaustionDuration}s.
description.ru: Выжившие получают слепоту и измотанность при лечении в радиусе ужаса.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor fast-vaults within {Tunable.K29P01.SurvivorVaultDistance}m of you, the next time you basic-vault a window, it is {Tunable.K29P01.VaultSpeed%}% faster. Cooldown: {Tunable.K29P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Ускоряет ваш прыжок после быстрого прыжка выжившего.

description.en: While carrying a Survivor, within {Tunable.K29P02.AuraRevealDistance}m of you, you see the Auras of other Survivors.
description.ru: Показывает ауры выживших рядом при переноске.

description.en:
When all Generators are completed: all injured, downed, and hooked Survivors gain {Keyword.Broken}.

When an Exit Gate is opened, this ends after {Tunable.K29P03.BrokenDuration}s.
description.ru: Все раненые выжившие становятся сломленными после завершения генераторов.

description.en: Whenever you damage a Generator, for {Tunable.K30P01.AuraRevealDuration}s, you see the Auras of Survivors within {Tunable.K30P01.AuraRevealDistance}m of you.
description.ru: После пинка генератора показывает ауры ближайших выживших.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Survivor, they are hexed and a Dull Totem ignites.

Every {Tunable.K30P02.ScreamInterval}s, other Survivors not within your Terror Radius scream, then you see their Auras for {Tunable.K30P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

When the hexed Survivor is downed or becomes healthy, the Hex Totem is extinguished.
description.ru: Проклятый выживший вызывает крики других выживших на расстоянии.

description.en: Whenever you are stunned by a Survivor, they gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K30P03.ExposedDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K30P03.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Выживший, оглушивший вас, становится уязвимым.

description.en:
While chasing the Obsession, whenever you basic-break Pallets or Breakable Walls, or damage Generators, you gain {Tunable.K31P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.K31P01.HasteDuration}s.

Whenever you damage the Survivor with the most chase time with a basic-attack, they become the Obsession.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение за разрушение объектов при погоне за одержимым.

description.en:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.K31P02.StartingTokens} Tokens, up to {Tunable.K31P02.MaxTokens}.

Whenever you hook a Survivor, you earn {Tunable.K31P02.TokenGainOnHook} Token.

Whenever you break a Pallet or Breakable Wall, spend {Tunable.K31P02.TokensSpentPerBreak} Token. Then, all Survivors within {Tunable.K31P02.Range}m scream and you see their Auras for {Tunable.K31P02.RevealDuration}s.
description.ru: При разрушении объекта вы видите ауры выживших и они кричат.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor unhooks another or themselves, they heal {Tunable.K31P03.HealPenalty%}% slower for {Tunable.K31P03.ReduceHealingDuration}s.
description.ru: Замедляет лечение после спасения.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor takes damage, they gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.K32P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.
description.ru: Выжившие становятся измотанными при получении урона.

description.en: Whenever you down a Survivor, other Survivors within {Tunable.K32P02.RequiredDistance}m of the downed Survivor gain {Tunable.K32P02.Hinder%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.K32P02.HinderedDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K32P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Замедляет выживших рядом с упавшим после его падения.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Generator, it becomes compromised.

When that Generator is completed by Survivors:
  • You gain {Tunable.K32P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.K32P03.PerkDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Undetectable} for {Tunable.K32P03.PerkDuration}s.


Only one Generator can be compromised at a time.
description.ru: При завершении повреждённого генератора вы получаете ускорение и необнаружимость.

description.en:
Whenever you search a Locker, Survivors within {Tunable.K33P01.RequiredDistance}m:
  • Gain {Keyword.Blindness} for {Tunable.K33P01.BlindnessDuration}s.
  • Scream.


Cooldown: {Tunable.K33P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: При обыске шкафчика выжившие рядом получают слепоту и кричат.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Survivor with a basic-attack, you gain {Tunable.K33P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.K33P02.HasteDuration}s.

While chasing a Survivor, you cannot gain Bloodlust.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение после атаки, но предотвращает кровожадность.

description.en:
Whenever you hook a Survivor, the farthest injured Survivor:
  • Gains {Keyword.Oblivious} for {Tunable.K33P03.ObliviousDuration}s.
  • You see their Aura for {Tunable.K33P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: После подвешивания вы видите ауру самого далёкого раненого выжившего.

description.en:
While this Hex is dull, each time you are blinded or stunned by a Survivor {Tunable.K34P01.StunnedOrBlindedTimesRequired} times, a Dull Totem ignites.

Whenever you are blinded or stunned by a Survivor you are not carrying, they are blinded for {Tunable.K34P01.BlindedDuration}s.
description.ru: При оглушении выживший получает слепоту.

description.en:
Whenever you hook a Survivor that is not the Obsession:
  • The Obsession gains {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K34P02.ExposedDuration}s.
  • You see the Obsession's Aura for {Tunable.K34P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.


Whenever you hook the Obsession, another Survivor:
  • Screams, then you are alerted.
  • Becomes the Obsession.
description.ru: Показывает ауру одержимого и делает его уязвимым при подвешивании другого.

description.en: Within {Tunable.K34P03.RequiredDistance}m of a completed Generator, you gain {Tunable.K34P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}. When you leave the range, this ends after {Tunable.K34P03.HasteLingerDuration}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение рядом с завершённым генератором.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor takes damage, for the next {Tunable.K35P01.EffectDuration}s, whenever you basic-vault a window, gain {Tunable.K35P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.K35P01.HasteDuration}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение после прыжка, если выживший получил урон.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Generator:
  • Your Terror Radius is set to that Generator for {Tunable.K35P02.EffectDuration}s and its radius is {Tunable.K35P02.TerrorRadiusSize}m.
  • You gain {Keyword.Undetectable} for that time.


Cooldown: {Tunable.K35P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: При повреждении генератора ваш радиус ужаса перемещается к нему, и вы становитесь необнаружимым.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor misses a basic Skill Check, earn {Tunable.K35P03.TokenGain} Tokens, up to {Tunable.K35P03.MaxTokens}.

Whenever you damage a Generator, spend all Tokens. For each Token spent:
  • The Generator loses {Tunable.K35P03.GeneratorRegressionPerToken%}% progress.
  • The Generator is blocked for {Tunable.K35P03.BlockTimePerToken}s.


When that Generator is unblocked, it begins regressing. Cooldown: {Tunable.K35P03.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: При промахе проверки навыка вы можете регрессировать генератор.

description.en:
The first time each item is depleted, it is dropped.

While a Survivor is within {Tunable.K36P01.AuraRevealDistance}m of a dropped item:
  • You see their Aura.
  • They see the item's Aura.


Whenever a Survivor picks-up an item, they gain {Keyword.Oblivious} for {Tunable.K36P01.ObliviousDuration}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауры выживших рядом с брошенными предметами.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor within {Tunable.K36P02.RangeFromKiller}m of you scares a Crow, they gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.K36P02.ExhaustedDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K36P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Выжившие становятся измотанными при пугании ворон рядом с вами.

description.en:
You basic-vault Windows {Tunable.K36P03.VaultSpeedIncrease%}% faster.

Whenever you are blinded or Pallet-stunned, the duration is {Tunable.K36P03.ExtraBlindStunDuration%}% longer.
description.ru: Ускоряет прыжки, но увеличивает длительность оглушения.

description.en:
The first time a Generator is completed, a Dull Totem ignites.

The Obsession:
  • Repairs {Tunable.K37P01.RepairSpeedPenalty%}% slower.
  • Sees the Hex Totem's Aura within {Tunable.K37P01.AuraRevealDistance}m.
description.ru: Замедляет ремонт одержимого и показывает ему тотем.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor gets within {Tunable.K37P02.AuraRevealRange}m of a locked Chest, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K37P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

You can lock unlocked Chests. Cooldown: {Tunable.K37P02.Cooldown}s.

You see the Auras of locked Chests.
description.ru: Показывает ауры выживших рядом с запертыми сундуками.

description.en: The first time each Chest is being unlocked and each Totem is being blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, it is blocked for {Tunable.K37P03.BlockDuration}s.
description.ru: Блокирует сундуки и тотемы при первом взаимодействии.

description.en: Whenever you fall from at least {Tunable.K38P01.RequiredFallHeight}m, your lunge-attacks are {Tunable.K38P01.LungeAttackExtra%}% longer for {Tunable.K38P01.EffectDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K38P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Увеличивает дальность выпада после падения с высоты.

description.en:
When the trial starts, 4 random Hooks become Scourge Hooks.

Whenever a Survivor is unhooked, the Hook becomes a Scourge Hook.

Whenever you hook a Survivor on a Scourge Hook, for {Tunable.K38P02.GeneratorRevealDuration}s, you see the Aura of the Generator with the most progress.
description.ru: Показывает ауру самого продвинутого генератора после подвешивания.

description.en: While self-healing, whenever a Survivor has {Tunable.K38P03.SelfHealTrigger%}% progress, they get special Skill Checks. If they miss one of these or stop healing, they gain {Keyword.Broken} for {Tunable.K38P03.BrokenDuration}s.
description.ru: При промахе проверки навыка при самолечении выживший становится сломленным.

description.en:
After you damage Survivors with a basic-attack {Tunable.K39P01.BasicHitsRequired} times, a Dull Totem ignites.

Whenever you damage a Survivor with a basic-attack, they gain {Tunable.K39P01.Hindered%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.K39P01.HinderedDuration}s.
description.ru: При атаке выжившие получают замедление.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor takes damage, you earn {Tunable.K39P02.TokensPerDamage} Token, up to {Tunable.K39P02.MaxTokens}.

For each Token:
  • You hook Survivors {Tunable.K39P02.BonusPerToken%}% faster.
  • You pick-up and drop Survivors {Tunable.K39P02.BonusPerToken%}% faster.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость подвешивания и переноски за каждый урон.

description.en:
The first time you hook each Survivor, earn {Tunable.K39P03.TokensPerUniqueHook} Token.

When all Generators are completed, for each Token:
  • Upright Pallets are blocked for {Tunable.K39P03.BlockDurationPerToken}s.
  • Windows are blocked for {Tunable.K39P03.BlockDurationPerToken}s.
description.ru: Блокирует палки и окна после завершения генераторов.

description.en:
Whenever you damage a Generator, it is compromised.

When that Generator is completed by Survivors, your basic-attack cooldowns are {Tunable.K40P01.AttackCooldownReduction%}% shorter for {Tunable.K40P01.Duration}s.

Only 1 Generator can be compromised at a time.
description.ru: Уменьшает перезарядку атаки после завершения повреждённого генератора.

description.en: Whenever a Survivor within your Terror Radius looks at you, they scream, then you see their Aura for {Tunable.K40P02.AuraRevealDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K40P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Выжившие кричат, когда смотрят на вас, и вы видите их ауры.

description.en:
Exit Gate Switches with at least {Tunable.K40P03.RegressionThreshold%}% progress regress at {Tunable.K40P03.RegressionRate%}% speed.

While they are regressing, Survivors see the Exit Gate Lights flicker randomly.
description.ru: Регрессирует переключатели выходных врат при определённом прогрессе.

description.en:
The first time you hook each Survivor, you earn {Tunable.K41P01.TokensPerUniqueHook} Token.

When you have {Tunable.K41P01.MaxTokens} Tokens, all Survivors:
  • Scream.
  • Gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K41P01.ExposedDuration}s.
description.ru: При наборе токенов все выжившие кричат и становятся уязвимыми.

description.en: Whenever you start chasing a Survivor, for the next {Tunable.K41P02.RevealDuration}s, you see the Auras of all other injured Survivors within {Tunable.K41P02.RevealDistance}m. Cooldown: {Tunable.K41P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауры раненых выживших при начале погони.

description.en:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites and hexes the farthest Generator from it.

After a Survivor repairs the hexed Generator for {Tunable.K41P03.RequiredTime} seconds:
  • You gain {Keyword.Undetectable} for {Tunable.K41P03.TerrorRadiusDisplacementDuration}s.
  • For that time, your Terror Radius is set to that Generator.


When the hexed Generator is repaired, the next farthest Generator is hexed.
description.ru: Перемещает радиус ужаса к генератору после его ремонта.

description.en: After hooking a Survivor, for the next {Tunable.K42P01.Duration}s, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to make target Generator you can see within {Tunable.K42P01.Range}m explode, lose {Tunable.K42P01.GeneratorRegression%}% progress and start regressing.
description.ru: Позволяет взорвать генератор после подвешивания.

description.en:
Whenever a totem is blessed or cleansed, a random unblocked Generator is blocked for {Tunable.K42P02.BlockDuration}s.

Whenever 1 or more Generators are blocked, you gain {Keyword.Undetectable} for {Tunable.K42P02.UndetectableDuration}s.
description.ru: Блокирует генератор при очищении тотема и даёт необнаружимость.

description.en:
The first time you hook a Survivor, a Dull Totem ignites.

The Auras of Generators show their progress.

When {Tunable.K42P03.GeneratorsToActivate} Generator remains:
  • All Generators explode, lose {Tunable.K42P03.GeneratorRegression%}% progress and start regressing.
  • The Hex Totem is extinguished.
description.ru: Показывает прогресс генераторов и взрывает их, когда остаётся один.

description.en:
While you are hooked, all Survivors see each others' Auras. While the Killer is within {Tunable.SG_Kindred.AuraRevealDistance}m, all Survivors sees the Killer's Aura.

While another Survivor is hooked, you see the Auras of other Survivors. While the Killer is within {Tunable.SG_Kindred.AuraRevealDistance}m of the hooked Survivor, you see the Killer's Aura.
description.ru: Показывает ауры убийцы и выживших рядом с крюком.

description.en:
Within {Tunable.S01P02.Range}m of you, other Survivors:
  • Cleanse Totems {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Heal {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Open Exit Gates {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Sabotage Hooks {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Unhook Survivors {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Unlock Chests {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.


After they leave your range, this ends after {Tunable.S01P02.LingerDuration}s.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость действий выживших рядом с вами.

description.en: When all other Survivors are dead, while within {Tunable.S08P01.HatchRevealDistance}m of the Hatch, you see its Aura.
description.ru: Показывает ауру люка, когда все остальные мертвы.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor attempts to blind you, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K03P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

You cannot be blinded.
description.ru: Вы не можете быть ослеплены и видите ауру выжившего при попытке ослепления.

description.en: Your Scratch Marks disappear {Tunable.SG_Lightweight.ScratchmarksTimeReduction}s faster and appear more spread out.
description.ru: Ваши следы исчезают быстрее и реже появляются.

description.en:
Whenever you medium or fast-vault:
  • You gain {Tunable.S09P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S09P02.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S09P02.ExhaustionDuration}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение после быстрого прыжка через препятствие.

description.en:
While injured, for up to {Tunable.S20P01.MaxDuration}s:
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.


For each second spent healing another Survivor, recharge the duration by {Tunable.S20P01.TimePerHealingSecond}s.
description.ru: Вы не оставляете следов и крови при ранении.

description.en:
While carrying a Survivor:
  • Whenever you miss a basic attack, your cooldown is {Tunable.K14P02.AttackCooldownReduction}% shorter.
  • Whenever you damage a Survivor with a basic attack, the carried Survivor gains no wiggle progress for {Tunable.K14P02.WigglePauseDuration}s.
description.ru: Уменьшает перезарядку атаки при промахе и останавливает освобождение при попадании.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor unhooks another or themselves while you are at least {Tunable.K11P03.MinimumDistance}m away:
  • They scream.
  • They gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K11P03.ExposedDuration}s.


Cooldown: {Tunable.K11P03.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Раскрывает спасателя при снятии с крюка далёкого выжившего.

description.en:
While Survivors are repairing a Generator:
  • They gain {Keyword.Blindness}.
  • They gain {Keyword.Exhausted}.


When they stop repairing a Generator, this ends after {Tunable.K17P03.LingerDuration}s.
description.ru: Выжившие получают слепоту и измотанность при ремонте генератора.

description.en:
While chasing a Survivor, your Terror Radius is {Tunable.K07P02.TerrorRadiusIncrease%}% bigger.

While not chasing a Survivor, your Terror Radius is {Tunable.K07P02.TerrorRadiusDecrease%}% smaller.
description.ru: Увеличивает радиус ужаса при погоне и уменьшает при её отсутствии.

description.en:
When the trial starts:
  • 4 random Hooks become Scourge Hooks.
  • The Basement Hooks become Scourge Hooks.


While you are at least {Tunable.KG_Monstrous_Shrine.Range}m away from a Survivor on a Scourge Hook, they are sacrificed {Tunable.KG_Monstrous_Shrine.FasterProgress%}% faster.
description.ru: Ускоряет жертву на проклятых крюках на расстоянии.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor blinds you, Locker-stuns or Pallet-stuns you, they become the Obsession.

Whenever a Survivor becomes the Obsession:
  • They gain {Keyword.Oblivious} for {Tunable.K18P03.ObliviousDuration}s.
  • You see their Aura for {Tunable.K18P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Выживший, оглушивший вас, становится одержимым и забывчивым.

name.ru: Проклятие: Никто не убежит от смерти

description.en:
When all Generators are completed, a Dull Totem ignites:
  • Survivors gain {Keyword.Exposed}.
  • You gain {Tunable.KG_No_One_Escapes_Death.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.


Within {Tunable.KG_No_One_Escapes_Death.AuraRevealStartRange}m, Survivors see the Hex Totem's Aura, expanding to {Tunable.KG_No_One_Escapes_Death.AuraRevealEndRange}m over {Tunable.KG_No_One_Escapes_Death.AuraSizeIncreaseDelay}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение и уязвимость после завершения генераторов.

description.en:
When all Generators are completed:
  • You heal {Tunable.SG_No_One_Left_Behind.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unhook other Survivors {Tunable.SG_No_One_Left_Behind.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • Whenever you unhook a Survivor, they gain {Tunable.SG_No_One_Left_Behind.IncreasedHaste%}% more {Keyword.Haste}.
  • You see the Auras of other Survivors.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость лечения и спасения после завершения генераторов.

description.en:
When the trial starts, you become injured, then:
  • You gain {Keyword.Broken}.
  • Your Grunts of Pain are {Tunable.S10P03.InjuredVoiceLevelReduction%}% quieter.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You recover {Tunable.S10P03.ExtraRecover%}% faster.
  • You can fully recover.
description.ru: Вы начинаете раненым и сломленным, но быстрее восстанавливаетесь.

description.en: Within {Tunable.K04P03.AuraRevealDistance}m of injured Survivors who are healing or being healed, you see their Auras.
description.ru: Показывает ауры выживших при лечении рядом с вами.

description.en:
While you are the Obsession, every {Tunable.S06P03.RevealTimeIntervals}s, the Killer sees your Aura for {Tunable.S06P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.

While the Killer sees your Aura:
  • You see their Aura.
  • You cleanse totems {Tunable.S06P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • You heal {Tunable.S06P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • You repair {Tunable.S06P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.


When the trial starts, you are more likely to be the Obsession.
description.ru: Показывает вашу ауру убийце и его ауру вам, ускоряя действия.

description.en:
Until all Generators are completed, whenever you are unhooked, for the next {Tunable.S21P01.Duration}s:
  • You gain {Keyword.Endurance}.
  • Your Grunts of Pain are {Tunable.S21P01.InjuredVoiceLevelReduction%}% quieter.
  • The Killer cannot see your Aura.
description.ru: Даёт выносливость и скрытность после спасения.

description.en: All Survivors see Auras that have a range from {Tunable.S07P01.AuraIncreaseDistance}m farther.
description.ru: Увеличивает дальность видения аур для всех выживших.

description.en:
Whenever a Survivor uses an item within {Tunable.K07P01.DistanceToSurvivorDistance}m of you, they gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.K07P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.

Whenever a Survivor within {Tunable.K07P01.DistanceToSurvivorDistance}m of you gains {Keyword.Exhausted}, you see the closest {Keyword.Exhausted} Survivor's Aura for {Tunable.K07P01.AuraRevealDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K07P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Выжившие становятся измотанными при использовании предметов рядом с вами.

description.en:
Whenever you unlock a Chest, it will contain a rare Med-Kit.

You unlock Chests {Tunable.S11P02.SearchSpeeds%}% faster.

The range at which the Killer hears you unlocking Chests is {Tunable.S11P02.NoiseReductionDistance}m shorter.
description.ru: Сундуки содержат аптечки, и вы быстрее их открываете.

description.en:
Whenever you stop chasing the Obsession, you earn {Tunable.K06P03.TokensGained} Token, up to {Tunable.K06P03.MaxTokens}. Cooldown: {Tunable.K06P03.ChargeGainedCooldown}s.


For each Token, gain {Tunable.K06P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.


Whenever you attack, lose {Tunable.K06P03.TokensLostOnAction} Token.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение за прекращение погони за одержимым.

description.en:
Within {Tunable.SG_Plunderers_Instinct.ChestAuraRevealDistance}m of locked Chests and dropped items, you see their Auras.


Whenever you unlock a Chest, you are {Tunable.SG_Plunderers_Instinct.ModifyChestRarity}% more likely to find an item of higher rarity.
description.ru: Показывает ауры сундуков и предметов, увеличивает шанс найти редкие предметы.

description.en:
The first time you start repairing each Generator, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S16P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.


Whenever a Generator is completed, you leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S16P02.StealthDuration}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру убийцы при начале ремонта и скрывает следы после завершения.

description.en: Whenever you hook a Survivor, for the next {Tunable.K12P03.ActiveDuration}s, when you damage a Generator, it explodes and loses {Tunable.K12P03.ExtraGeneratorDamage%}% more progress.
description.ru: После крюка пнуть генератор для мгновенного регресса.

description.en: When you stop chasing a Survivor, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K02P01.AuraRevealDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K02P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру выжившего после прекращения погони.

description.en: While the Killer is within {Tunable.SG_Premonition.PerkEffectDistance}m of you and inside a {Tunable.SG_Premonition.ActivationAngle} degree cone, whenever you look at them, you hear a sound cue. Cooldown: {Tunable.SG_Premonition.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Даёт звуковой сигнал, когда убийца рядом и вы смотрите на него.

description.en: For each other Survivor within {Tunable.S01P03.Range}m of you, all Survivors repair {Tunable.S01P03.RepairBonusPerSurvivor%}% faster.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость ремонта за каждого ближайшего выжившего.

description.en: You hide in Lockers and vault silently. The Killer is not alerted. Cooldown: {Tunable.S02P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Вы бесшумно прячетесь и прыгаете.

description.en:
Whenever a Generator is completed:
  • You are alerted to the position of all Survivors for {Tunable.K13P03.SurvivorRevealDuration}s.
  • The Obsession sees your Aura for {Tunable.K13P03.KillerRevealDuration}s.


When all Generators are completed:
  • The Obsession gains {Keyword.Exposed}.
  • You can Kill the Obsession.
description.ru: Показывает ауры выживших и делает одержимого уязвимым.

description.en:
After you repair a Generator for at least {Tunable.S21P02.TimeToActivate}s, you see its Aura.

When you hide in a Locker, the Killer is alerted to the Generator. Cooldown: {Tunable.S21P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру генератора и отвлекает убийцу при прятке в шкафчик.

description.en:
Whenever the Obsession takes damage, you earn 1 Token, up to {Tunable.K10P02.MaximumTokens}.


For each Token, Survivors who are not the Obsession open Exit Gates {Tunable.K10P02.ActionSpeedPenalty%}% slower.
description.ru: Замедляет открытие выходных врат за каждый токен от одержимого.

description.en: After repairing Generators for {Tunable.S22P03.RepairTimeNeeded}s, while repairing a Generator alone, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to block that generator for {Tunable.S22P03.GeneratorBlockDuration}s.
description.ru: Позволяет заблокировать генератор после ремонта.

description.en:
While injured:
  • You bless and cleanse Totems {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You heal {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You open Exit Gates {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You repair {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You sabotage Hooks {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unhook Survivors {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unlock chests {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You vault {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость действий в состоянии ранения.

description.en:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S24P01.StartingTokens} Tokens.

Spend {Tunable.S24P01.TokensPerRummage} Token to rummage an empty Chest, up to {Tunable.S24P01.MaxRummagesPerChest} times per Chest.

You rummage Chests {Tunable.S24P01.ChestSearchSpeedBonus%}% faster.
description.ru: Позволяет обыскивать пустые сундуки и ускоряет обыск.

description.en:
Whenever you attempt to fast-enter a Locker:
  • You do not enter the Locker.
  • The Killer is alerted.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S24P02.NoScratchMarksDuration}s.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S24P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Отвлекает убийцу при попытке спрятаться в шкафчик.

description.en:
While carried by the Killer, while you have at least {Tunable.S24P03.WiggleRequired%}% wiggle and next to an Upright Pallet, you can drop it to stun the Killer.

While downed, you see the Auras of Upright Pallets.
description.ru: Сбросить поддон при переноске при 50% барахтания.

description.en:
Whenever you unhook another Survivor, you earn {Tunable.S25P01.TokensPerHook} Token, up to {Tunable.S25P01.MaxTokens}.

While repairing, whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, spend all Tokens. For each Token spent, the Generator gains {Tunable.S25P01.BonusPerToken%}% permanent progress.
description.ru: Даёт токены за спасение и ускоряет ремонт при успешной проверке.

description.en:
Whenever you Pallet-stun the Killer:
  • You gain {Tunable.S25P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S25P02.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S25P02.ExhaustedDuration}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение при оглушении убийцы, но вы становитесь измотанным.

description.en: Whenever another Survivor is hooked, you gain {Keyword.Elusive} for {Tunable.S25P03.Duration}s.
description.ru: Даёт неуловимость, когда другой выживший подвешен.

description.en:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S26P01.StartingTokens} Token.

Whenever you cleanse a Totem, earn {Tunable.S26P01.TokensPerCleanse} Token, then, you see the Aura of the farthest Totem for {Tunable.S26P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

For each Token, you cleanse Totems {Tunable.S26P01.StackableCleanseSpeed%}% faster.
description.ru: Ускоряет очищение тотемов и показывает ауру самого далёкого тотема.

description.en: Whenever you are unhooked, you gain {Tunable.S26P02.HealRegain%}% healing progress.
description.ru: Даёт прогресс лечения после спасения.

description.en:
After repairing {Tunable.S26P03.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Generator, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to trap it for {Tunable.S26P03.TrapDuration}s. All Survivors see that Generator's Aura for that time.

When the Killer damages that Generator, the trap explodes, then:
  • They are stunned for {Tunable.S26P03.StunBlindDuration}s.
  • Everyone nearby looking at the detonation is blinded.
description.ru: Устанавливает ловушку на генератор, оглушающую убийцу.

description.en:
While healing, you and the healed Survivor make no noises or Grunts of Pain. Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check:
  • You lose only {Tunable.S27P01.OverrideHealFailPenalty%}% progress.
  • The Killer is not alerted.
description.ru: Вы и выживший не издаёте звуков при лечении.

description.en:
After repairing {Tunable.S27P02.RequiredProgressToCraft%}% of Generators, while hiding in a Locker, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to craft a Flashbang.

When you use the Flashbang:
  • Everyone nearby looking at the detonation is blinded.
  • The Killer is alerted.
description.ru: Позволяет создать светошумовую гранату после ремонта генератора.

description.en: After you hit {Tunable.S27P03.SkillchecksRequiredAmount} basic repair Skill Checks, while a Generator is regressing, you see its Aura.
description.ru: Показывает ауру регрессирующего генератора после успешных проверок.

description.en:
Whenever you bless or cleanse a Totem, while not holding an item, use {Input.UseItem} to, for up to {Tunable.S28P01.AuraRevealDuration}s and within {Tunable.S28P01.AuraRevealDistance}m:
  • See the Auras of Chests.
  • See the Auras of Exit Gate Switches.
  • See the Auras of Generators.
  • See the Aura of the Hatch.
  • See the Auras of Hooks.
description.ru: Показывает ауры объектов после очищения тотема.

description.en:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons.

Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • While healing without a Med-Kit, they heal others {Tunable.S28P02.HealingSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • While injured, other Survivors see their Aura.
description.ru: Ускоряет лечение других без аптечки и показывает ауры раненых.

description.en:
While next to a Totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons. Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • Leave no Scratch Marks.
  • Their Auras cannot be seen by the Killer.


When leaving the range, this ends after {Tunable.S28P03.LingerDuration}s.
description.ru: Скрывает следы и ауры выживших в радиусе тотема.

description.en:
Whenever you take damage:
  • You retain your speed boost for {Tunable.S29P01.ExtraBoostTime}s longer.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S29P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.
description.ru: Увеличивает длительность ускорения после получения урона, но вы становитесь измотанным.

description.en:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S29P02.StartingTokens} Tokens, up to {Tunable.S29P02.MaxTokens}.

Whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, earn {Tunable.S29P02.TokensGainedPerGreat} Token.

Whenever another Survivor misses a basic Skill Check, spend {Tunable.S29P02.TokensSpentPerMiss} Token:
  • The missed Skill Check becomes a good Skill Check.
  • You see that Survivor's Aura for {Tunable.S29P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Исправляет промахи проверок навыка других выживших за токены.

description.en:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon totem that combines all your Boons.

Downed Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • Recover {Tunable.S29P03.RecoverSpeedBoost%}% faster.
  • Can fully recover.
description.ru: Ускоряет восстановление упавших выживших в радиусе тотема.

description.en:
Whenever you stun the Killer, for {Tunable.S30P01.StealthDuration}s:
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.
description.ru: Даёт скрытность после оглушения убийцы.

description.en:
You heal other Survivors {Tunable.S30P02.HealingBonus%}% faster.

Injured Survivors see your Aura.
description.ru: Ускоряет лечение других и показывает вашу ауру раненым.

description.en:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons.

Survivors within the Boon's range gain {Tunable.S30P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}. When leaving the range, this ends after {Tunable.S30P03.LingerDuration}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение выжившим в радиусе тотема.

description.en:
Whenever the Killer damages another Survivor, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S31P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

You see other Survivors' Scratch Marks.
description.ru: Показывает ауру убийцы при ранении другого выжившего и следы выживших.

description.en:
Whenever you blind the Killer, they gain {Keyword.Blindness} for {Tunable.S31P02.BlindnessDuration}s.

You can rummage Chests {Tunable.S31P02.MaxRummagePerChest} time. The first time you rummage a Chest, it will contain an uncommon Flashlight.
description.ru: При ослеплении убийцы он получает слепоту, и вы можете обыскать сундук.

description.en: Whenever you bless or cleanse a Totem, until you take damage, you repair {Tunable.S31P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster. If that Totem was a Hex Totem, the effect is doubled.
description.ru: Ускоряет ремонт после очищения тотема.

description.en:
After repairing {Tunable.S32P01.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Generator, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to trap it for {Tunable.S32P01.TrapDuration}s or until the Killer damages that Generator. All Survivors see that Generator's Aura for that time.

While the Killer is within {Tunable.S32P01.AuraRevealRange}m of that Generator, all Survivors see the Killer's Aura.
description.ru: Устанавливает ловушку на генератор, показывающую ауру убийцы.

description.en: While injured, whenever another Survivor within {Tunable.S32P02.MaximumDistance}m of you takes damage, you gain {Tunable.S32P02.HealingProgressionIncrease%}% missing healing progress.
description.ru: Даёт прогресс лечения, когда другой выживший рядом получает урон.

description.en:
When all other Survivors are downed or hooked, for {Tunable.S32P03.EffectDuration}s:
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.
description.ru: Даёт скрытность, когда все остальные выжившие упали или подвешены.

description.en:
Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, until they take damage:
  • They bless and cleanse {Tunable.S33P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • They heal {Tunable.S33P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • They unlock Chests {Tunable.S33P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
description.ru: Ускоряет действия выжившего после лечения.

description.en: Once per Hook State, while within {Tunable.S33P02.RadiusDistance}m of a hooked Survivor, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to stop the sacrifice progress for {Tunable.S33P02.StrugglePauseDuration}s.
description.ru: Останавливает прогресс жертвы рядом с подвешенным выжившим.

description.en:
Whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S33P03.TokensPerGreat} Token, up to {Tunable.S33P03.MaxTokens}.

For each Token, basic Skill Checks:
  • Appear {Tunable.S33P03.SkillCheckBonusChance%}% more often.
  • Spin {Tunable.S33P03.SkillCheckSpeedIncrease%}% faster.
  • Whenever you hit a great, give {Tunable.S33P03.SkillCheckBonusPerToken%}% more progress.


Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, hit a good Skill Check, or stop healing or repairing, lose all Tokens.
description.ru: Накапливает заряды на отличных проверках навыка, ускоряя ремонт генераторов.

description.en:
While repairing, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to earn Tokens instead of progress, up to {Tunable.S34P01.MaxTokens} Tokens.

While you have at least {Tunable.S34P01.TokensToActivate} Token, {Input.ActivatableButton2} to spend all Tokens and gain {Tunable.S34P01.ProgressPerToken%}% progress for each Token spent.

Whenever you take damage, lose all Tokens.
description.ru: Позволяет накапливать токены вместо прогресса и тратить их на ремонт.

description.en: While repairing, whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S34P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру убийцы при успешной проверке навыка.

description.en:
While chased by the Killer:
  • You see the Auras of other Survivors.
  • Other Survivors repair {Tunable.S34P03.RepairBoost%}% faster.


Whenever you take damage, cooldown: {Tunable.S34P03.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Увеличивает скорость ремонта генераторов для других, пока вы в погоне.

description.en:
While chased by the Killer, whenever you medium or fast-vault:
  • For up to {Tunable.S35P01.StealthDuration}s, your medium and fast vaults are silent.
  • During that time, whenever you medium or fast-vault, the timer is reset.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S35P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Делает ваши прыжки бесшумными при погоне.

description.en: Whenever you finish repairing a Generator with at least 1 other Survivor, Survivors who finished repairing it repair {Tunable.S35P02.ExtraRepairSpeed%}% faster for {Tunable.S35P02.BoostDuration}s.
description.ru: Ускоряет ремонт после совместного завершения генератора.

description.en: Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, while you stay within {Tunable.S35P03.RequiredDistance}m of each other, you both gain {Tunable.S35P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}. When either of you leaves the range, this ends after {Tunable.S35P03.LingerDuration}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение вам и выжившему после лечения, пока вы рядом.

description.en:
Whenever the Killer picks-up another Survivor, for the next {Tunable.S36P01.EffectDuration}s, when you start running:
  • Gain {Tunable.S36P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S36P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • Gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S36P01.ExhaustedDuration}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение при беге после подбора выжившего, но вы становитесь измотанным.

description.en:
Until all Generators are completed, whenever you are unhooked, for the next {Tunable.S36P02.EffectDuration}s, while {Keyword.Exhausted}, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to lose {Keyword.Exhausted} instantly.

This is disabled by conspicuous actions.
description.ru: Позволяет мгновенно снять измотанность после спасения.

description.en: Whenever another Survivor finishes healing you, while within {Tunable.S36P03.RequiredDistance}m of each other, you both leave no Scratch Marks. When either of you leaves the range, this ends after {Tunable.S36P03.LingerDuration}s.
description.ru: Вы и выживший не оставляете следов после лечения, пока рядом.

description.en:
While chased by the Killer:
  • You see the Aura of the Generator with the most progress.
  • Whenever you drop a Pallet, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S37P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.


When the Killer stops chasing you, this ends after {Tunable.S37P01.LingeringDuration}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауру самого продвинутого генератора и убийцы при сбросе палки.

description.en:
While injured, whenever you finish healing another Survivor, you gain {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S37P02.EnduranceDuration}s.

While you have Deep Wound, you gain {Tunable.S37P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.
description.ru: Даёт выносливость после лечения и ускорение при глубокой ране.

description.en:
While repairing and while your Toolbox is empty, whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S37P03.TokensPerGreat} Token.

When you have {Tunable.S37P03.MaxTokens} Tokens, spend them all:
  • Your Toolbox is recharged instantly.
  • You repair {Tunable.S37P03.RepairDebuff%}% slower for {Tunable.S37P03.RepairDebuffDuration}s.


You can rummage Chests {Tunable.S37P03.Rummages} time. The first time you rummage a Chest, it will contain an uncommon Toolbox.
description.ru: Восстанавливает инструмент за успешные проверки навыка.

description.en:
While healthy and running, use {Input.ActivatableButton1}:
  • You gain {Tunable.S38P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S38P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S38P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.


Then, one happens at random:
  • You gain {Tunable.S38P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S38P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.S38P01.ExposedDuration}s.
  • You gain a random rare item with random add-ons.
  • You scream, but nothing happens.


The same effect cannot happen twice in a row.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение или случайный эффект, но может сделать вас уязвимым.

description.en:
While you are within the Killer's Terror Radius, whenever you look at them:
  • Scream, then see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S38P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.
  • There is a {Tunable.S38P02.ChanceOfExtraScream%}% chance you will scream again. If you do, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S38P02.ExtraAuraRevealDuration}s more.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S38P02.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Вы кричите и видите ауру убийцы, когда смотрите на него.

description.en:
While injured, crouched and idle, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to be downed silently.

While downed this way, once per trial:
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You recover {Tunable.S38P03.RecoverySpeedIncrease%}% faster.
  • You can fully recover.


Whenever you recover this way:
  • You gain {Tunable.S38P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S38P03.HasteDuration}s.
  • You are healed instantly.


When all Generators are completed, you can use this ability once again.
description.ru: Позволяет тихо упасть и восстановиться с ускорением.

description.en:
While hiding in a Locker, you make no Grunts of Pain.

Whenever you exit a Locker, for {Tunable.S39P01.EffectDuration}s:
  • You see the Aura of the closest Generator.
  • You see the Auras of other Survivors.
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S39P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Показывает ауры после выхода из шкафчика и даёт скрытность.

description.en:
After repairing {Tunable.S39P02.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Dropped Pallet, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to trap it for {Tunable.S39P02.TrapDuration}s. All Survivors see that Pallet's Aura for that time.

When the Killer breaks that Pallet, the trap explodes and they gain {Tunable.S39P02.Hinder%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.S39P02.HinderDuration}s.
description.ru: Устанавливает ловушку на палку, замедляющую убийцу.

description.en:
While healthy and running, your footsteps are silent to the Killer.

Whenever you do a fast-action, cooldown: {Tunable.S39P03.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Ваши шаги бесшумны при беге.

description.en:
While you are using a Flashlight, you gain {Tunable.S40P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.

Whenever you blind the Killer, they gain {Tunable.S40P01.Hindered%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.S40P01.HinderedDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S40P01.Cooldown}s.
description.ru: Даёт ускорение при использовании фонарика и замедляет убийцу при ослеплении.

description.en:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon totem that combines all your Boons.

Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • See the Auras of Chests.
  • See the Auras of Generators.


While you have a Boon Totem, you bless and cleanse {Tunable.S40P02.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
description.ru: Показывает ауры сундуков и генераторов в радиусе тотема.

description.en:
While injured, basic Skill Checks:
  • Are {Tunable.S40P03.ExtraSkillCheckChance%}% more likely to appear.
  • Appear in random places.


Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, you lose {Tunable.S40P03.FailureMitigation%}% less progress.
description.ru: Увеличивает частоту проверок навыка при ранении и уменьшает потерю прогресса.

description.en:
While in the Basement next to the circle, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to invoke. While invoking, other Survivors see your Aura and can join your Invocation.

When the Invocation is completed:
  • All Generators gain {Tunable.S41P01.GeneratorChargeReduction} permanent charges.
  • You become injured.
  • You gain {Keyword.Broken}.


Each Invocation can only be completed once per trial.
description.ru: Уменьшает заряд всех генераторов после завершения ритуала.

description.en:
While in the Basement:
  • You can heal yourself at {Tunable.S41P02.SelfHealSpeed%}% speed.
  • Whenever you finish healing, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S41P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Позволяет лечиться в подвале и видеть ауру убийцы после лечения.

description.en:
While in the Basement, you can unhook yourself.

Whenever you are unhooked, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S41P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.
description.ru: Позволяет спасти себя в подвале и видеть ауру убийцы после спасения.

description.en: After repairing {Tunable.S42P01.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Chest, Exit Gate Switch, Generator, or Totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to create a static illusion for {Tunable.S42P01.HuskDuration}s.
description.ru: Создаёт статичную иллюзию рядом с объектами.

description.en:
While idle, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to perform, empowering all Survivors within {Tunable.S42P02.PerformanceDistance}m for up to {Tunable.S42P02.PerformanceDuration}s. While you are performing, other Survivors will see your Aura. Roll a d20:
  • 1 | You scream, but nothing happens.
